name: Build An Obby
description: Build your Obby! How big can you make it? • Buy blocks, walls, ramps, lava, and more to BUILD your obby! • Play your obby to EARN money! • Upgrade your plot to build EVEN BIGGER obbies!
instructions: Just move with WASD or use the joystick on your phone And use your mouse or tap the button to interact with objects on the map
